# Merve Algan — SEO & GEO Manager
# https://mervealgan.com

Merve Algan is a SEO & GEO Manager based in İzmir, Turkey.
Specializations: Technical SEO, Content Architecture, GEO (Generative Engine Optimization), AI Visibility, Organic Growth.

## Key pages
- Homepage: https://mervealgan.com/
- About: https://mervealgan.com/hakkimda
- Blog (SEO/GEO insights): https://mervealgan.com/blog
- Case Studies: https://mervealgan.com/calismalar
- GEO Work: https://mervealgan.com/geo-calismalari
- Tools: https://mervealgan.com/kaynaklar
- Contact: https://mervealgan.com/iletisim

## Notable projects
- Vepara (fintech SEO, virtual POS visibility, schema, AI visibility)
- Prismind Media (agency SEO/GEO content architecture)
- HeyPilot, FreudAI, LayeredMindAI (AI product SEO)
